title: Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
